/usr/bin/ar qc libv8reader_core.a CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Unpacker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Container.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/TreeReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Element.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/V8Format.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/Guid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v8reader_core.dir/src/Types.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libv8reader_core.a
